title: Revival
description: A modpack about improving and refining vanilla without compromising the game's identity.
body:
## About
Immerse yourself in brand-new yet familiar adventures! Take your time to explore, face new challenges, and build as much as you want. Meaningful balancing changes have been made to enhance the midgame, ensuring you enjoy every step of your journey while reducing the rush to a fully maxed-out but empty endgame experience.
 
Designed for both single and multiplayer, everything has been carefully crafted to align with the game's aesthetic and design principles.

## Highlights

### Gameplay and New Content

- More meaningful and rewarding progression and advancements
- Updated biomes, new sounds, structures, and mobs (including those from past mob votes)
- Added blocks and items that should have already been in the game
- Buffed early-game methods of transportation
- Rebalanced combat based on the Combat Test Snapshots
- Actually playable third-person mode
- Improved mob AI
- Bedrock parity! _(only the good parts)_

### Mechanics

- _Problems with inventory management? **NO MORE!**_
- Chainstone and movable tile entities
- Enchanting and repairing mechanics are now more predictable and less grindy
- Villager trading is more flexible and less exploitable
- Tools and elytras are trimmable; _gold-trimmed armor now distracts Piglins!_
- _Wandering Traders can return items that were destroyed or despawned_
- _Reworked Phantom spawning conditions_

### Client Improvements

- quality-of-life!
- Lots of eye and ear candy
- More polished menus and controls
- _In-game screenshot viewer_, plus Shader, Resource, and Data Pack browser
- Visual and comparative equipment info (durability, enchantability, repair cost, and more!)
- Improved multiplayer features: enhanced chat, voice chat, _emotes_, _and other visual interactions_
- Fixed bugs and odd behavior from vanilla
- **NO CHAT REPORTS AND TELEMETRY**

### Other

- ~~Capybaras~~


**_Italicized items are current missing or not totally implemented in 1.21_**


## Accessibility Warnings
In order to keep this pack accessible to everybody, you might want to change some options or disable some mods:
- Nyf's Spiders - Makes spiders climb walls more realistically
- Camera Overhaul - Adds some camera effects that can be nauseating (especially when flying in creative or spectator modes)
- Ore Variants (Resource Pack) - Might make ores harder to identify if you have color blindness

## Credits
- Vanilla Tweaks:
https://vanillatweaks.net/
- Xali's Enhanced Vanilla (git version):
https://github.com/xalixilax/xali-s-Enhanced-Vanilla-16x
- Fresh Animations Extensions:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations-extensions
- Increased Nether build height:
https://github.com/Apollounknowndev/pack-library/tree/main/nether-build-height
